headline: CTO at Box focused on enterprise AI, content intelligence, and secure cloud platforms
title: Chief Technology Officer
confidenceNote: Box speaker bio and LinkedIn consistently identify Ben Kus as CTO of Box; multiple Box and industry sources connect him to enterprise AI strategy and prior Subspace/BigFix work.
bioMarkdown: CTO at Box, where he leads technology and AI strategy for secure enterprise content intelligence. Previously co-founded Subspace, acquired by Box, and held architecture/security leadership roles around BigFix and IBM. Useful match for conversations on enterprise AI adoption, agentic workflows, unstructured data, and secure cloud platforms.

primary.label: Box speaker bio
primary.note: Official Box bio identifies him as CTO and summarizes AI strategy, Subspace, BigFix/IBM, and UC Berkeley background.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Public profile identifies him as Chief Technology Officer at Box in the San Francisco Bay Area.

secondary.label: InformationWeek author profile
secondary.note: Contributor profile repeats Box CTO role and focus on enterprise unstructured data and AI.

secondary.label: Computerworld interview
secondary.note: Interview context on Box's agentic AI direction.

headline: Co-founder and Chief Architect at ContextBridge building tools for reliable AI coding workflows
title: Co-founder / Chief Architect
confidenceNote: ContextBridge's site, LinkedIn, and GitHub profile align on Ben Limmer's ContextBridge role, Denver location, and developer-experience/architecture focus.
bioMarkdown: Co-founder and Chief Architect at ContextBridge, building infrastructure for higher-quality AI coding workflows and agent context management. Background spans developer tooling, technical mentorship, cloud architecture, and scaling engineering systems. Good match for conversations on coding agents, plan review, context hygiene, and pragmatic engineering quality.

primary.label: ContextBridge website
primary.note: Company site lists Ben Limmer as Co-founder / Chief Architect and describes his engineering leadership and cloud systems background.

primary.label: GitHub profile
primary.note: Public GitHub profile lists Ben Limmer, ContextBridge affiliation, Denver location, and developer-experience focus.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Public profile identifies him as Co-Founder at ContextBridge in Denver.

secondary.label: PlanBridge site
secondary.note: Product page says PlanBridge is built by Donnie Flood, Josh Carver, and Ben Limmer at ContextBridge AI.

secondary.label: ContextBridge LinkedIn company page
secondary.note: Company page lists Ben Limmer among ContextBridge employees and Denver as a company location.

headline: GTM and sales leader at Guild.ai helping enterprises operationalize AI agents
title: VP GTM
confidenceNote: Guild sources confirm Ben Oren recently joined as VP of Sales/GTM and his enterprise technology background; public LinkedIn location shows Colorado, while the provided participant record says San Francisco.
bioMarkdown: GTM leader at Guild.ai focused on helping enterprises move AI agents from experimentation into governed production use. His recent Guild post cites prior enterprise adoption work across Box, Twilio, JumpCloud, and Aampe. Useful match for conversations on AI agent commercialization, enterprise buyer education, and control-plane adoption.

primary.label: Guild.ai author post
primary.note: Ben Oren's Guild post explains why he joined and describes his focus on enterprise AI, governance, observability, and control planes.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Public profile identifies him as a GTM leader at Guild.ai and shows prior enterprise GTM experience.

secondary.label: Guild.ai LinkedIn announcement
secondary.note: Guild welcome post links to his joining story and frames the company mission around operating AI inside real companies.

secondary.label: Guild.ai news index
secondary.note: Guild news index lists Ben Oren's joining article among company updates.

headline: Founder of Better Auth building open-source TypeScript authentication infrastructure
title: Founder & CEO
confidenceNote: Better Auth, GitHub, YC, and LinkedIn sources consistently identify Bereket Engida as founder/creator of Better Auth with a TypeScript developer-infrastructure focus.
bioMarkdown: Founder of Better Auth, an open-source TypeScript authentication framework backed by YC and Peak XV. Builds developer infrastructure with an emphasis on owning auth data, clean APIs, and strong DX. Useful match for conversations on auth architecture, open-source devtools, TypeScript ecosystems, and scaling founder-led infrastructure projects.

primary.label: Better Auth seed announcement
primary.note: Official Better Auth post by Bereket Engida announces seed funding and describes the product roadmap.

primary.label: GitHub profile
primary.note: Profile identifies Bereket Engida as author of Better Auth and other open-source libraries.

primary.label: Y Combinator company profile
primary.note: YC profile lists Better Auth and Bereket Engida as founder, with product description and San Francisco location.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Public profile identifies him as creator of Better Auth in San Francisco.

secondary.label: TechCrunch profile
secondary.note: Reports Better Auth's funding, origin story, and developer adoption.

secondary.label: devtools.fm episode
secondary.note: Podcast episode focused on Bereket Engida and the Better Auth library.

headline: CTO at Future Verification Technology working on verification, anti-fraud, cloud, blockchain, and data systems
title: Chief Technology Officer
confidenceNote: LinkedIn and secondary company databases identify Bernard Lin as CTO of Future Verification Technology; the strongest detailed profile is on The Org and marked unverified, so confidence is medium.
bioMarkdown: CTO at Future Verification Technology, a verification-as-a-service company focused on fraud reduction and transparency. Public profiles describe experience across cloud computing, big data strategy, machine learning, blockchain, and engineering leadership. Useful match for conversations on authenticity, product verification, anti-fraud infrastructure, and applied blockchain systems.

primary.label: Future Verification Technology website
primary.note: Company site describes Future Verification Technology as a verification-as-a-service company focused on fraud reduction and transparency.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Public profile places Bernard Lin at Future Verification Technology Inc. in New York.

secondary.note: Lists Bernard Lin as CTO and summarizes cloud, big data, machine learning, and blockchain experience; page is marked unverified.

secondary.note: Lists Bernard Lin on the Future Verification Technology leadership team as Chief Technology Officer.
